---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/camilita2
---

## Hi, I'm Camila!

I'm a senior student working on reproducing deep learning-based 
aberration compensation for fluorescence microscopy as my senior project.

This blog documents my journey through the paper by Min Guo et al. (2024),
including data exploration, model training, and results.
